mechanics.excerpt: JumpShips (carrying DropShips travel routes between severa well-inhabited star systems and many DropShips have been modified to serve a5 passenger liners_ Characters on remote planets will have t0 book passage cargo rather than passenger vessel, spending the length of the journey whatever cramped quarters are available: Additionally: transportation into and out of dangerous areas such as planets under attack.
